categories.name: Outerwear
categories.yards_required_source: Mean of subcategories.json outerwear base_yardage values: (3.2+2.0+2.2+2.8+2.5+2.4+2.3+3.5)/8 = 2.61 yds. Consistent with Sewport CMT benchmarks for structured jackets and coats.
categories.labor_base_usd_source: USFIA 2024 / Sewport benchmark: moderate-complexity outerwear CMT for contemporary womenswear, $28–38 range (mid-tier Asian / nearshore production). Baseline calibrated to 'moderate' construction; high=×1.35 → $43.20, low=×0.75 → $24.00.

categories.name: Tops
categories.yards_required_source: Mean of subcategories.json tops base_yardage values: (1.2+0.8+1.8+2.0+1.3+0.7+1.4+2.0)/8 = 1.40 yds.
categories.labor_base_usd_source: Sewport / Maker's Row CMT benchmark: moderate-complexity tops (blouses, button-downs) for contemporary womenswear, $11–18 range. high=×1.35 → $18.90, low=×0.75 → $10.50.

categories.name: Bottoms
categories.yards_required_source: Mean of subcategories.json bottoms base_yardage values: (1.8+2.2+0.8+1.5+1.0+2.0+1.6+2.4)/8 = 1.66 yds.
categories.labor_base_usd_source: USFIA 2024 CMT benchmark: moderate-complexity bottoms (trousers, skirts) for contemporary womenswear, $14–22 range (mid-tier production). high=×1.35 → $23.63, low=×0.75 → $13.13.

categories.name: Dresses
categories.yards_required_source: Mean of subcategories.json dresses base_yardage values: (1.8+2.5+3.2+2.8+2.0+2.6+2.4+2.0)/8 = 2.41 yds.
categories.labor_base_usd_source: Sewport CMT benchmark: moderate-complexity dresses (midi/wrap/shirt dress) for contemporary womenswear, $17–26 range. high=×1.35 → $28.35, low=×0.75 → $15.75.

categories.name: Knitwear
categories.yards_required_source: Mean of subcategories.json knitwear base_yardage values (reference only; not used in COGS when knit_weight_kg is set): (1.8+2.2+1.2+1.6+2.0+1.8+1.4+2.8)/8 = 1.85 yds.
categories.labor_base_usd_source: Sewport / Maker's Row benchmark: moderate-complexity knitwear CMT for contemporary womenswear, $18–28 range (linking and looping operations). high=×1.35 → $29.70, low=×0.75 → $16.50.
categories.knit_weight_kg_source: Per-subcategory yarn consumption benchmarks for womenswear size M: sweater ~480g, cardigan ~560g, knit vest ~280g, turtleneck ~420g, hoodie ~560g, pullover ~460g, knit polo ~340g, cape ~800g — mean 487.5g rounded to 0.48 kg. Source: Sewport knitwear sourcing benchmarks; consistent with industry 400–600g range for standard-gauge womenswear sweaters.
